# requireStepUp

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

Execute the requireStepUp query

## Usage

```typescript
db.query.requireStepUp({ stepUpType: '<String>' }).execute()
```

## Examples

### Run requireStepUp

```typescript
const result = await db.query.requireStepUp({ stepUpType: '<String>' }).execute();
```
